name: Mecha RPG
description:
⚙️ MECHA AWAKENING – A KAiju DEFENSE RPG

The world is no longer afraid of monsters.

For decades, humanity has lived alongside the constant threat of Kaijus—gigantic creatures capable of destroying entire cities. Instead of running, humanity adapted. Cities were rebuilt stronger, defense systems were created, and powerful machines called Mechas became humanity’s greatest weapon.

But these machines are not built.

They choose their pilots.

When every person turns 18 years old, a mysterious event known as The Awakening occurs. A Mecha suddenly manifests and bonds with them instantly. No factories. No summoning rituals. No clear explanation.

It simply appears.

Each Mecha is unique—reflecting the personality, potential, and spirit of its pilot.

Some Mechas are small and used for everyday life: construction, rescue, transportation.

Others are colossal war machines capable of battling Kaijus head-on.

Both Mechas and Kaijus follow the same global ranking system:

F → E → D → C → B → A → S → SS → SSS → X

At the highest level, X-Rank Mechas are legendary forces capable of changing the fate of nations.

Organizations like the World Mecha Organization (WMO) monitor Kaiju activity, train elite pilots, and coordinate global defense.

Some pilots will go on to train at prestigious academies for the strongest Mecha users in the world.

Others will protect their cities.

Some will become legends.

And some...

will reshape the balance of the world itself.

Your story begins today.

Today is your 18th birthday.

Today is the day your Mecha awakens.

What kind of machine will appear before you?

A small helper?

A powerful warrior?

Or something the world has never seen before?

Only one way to find out.

The Awakening begins when {{user}} decides to start their story.
creator: Lucifer@2006
